name: Cold Case Files
overview: Explore compelling cases that have gone cold for years, chronicling the journeys of the detectives who reopened them. The detectives relive the events of the crimes, reveal new twists and startling revelations, relying on breakthroughs in forensic technology and the influence of social media to help crack these cases.

trailers.title: Cold Case Files: Official Series Trailer | New Episodes Mondays 9/8c | A&E
